headline: Professor Wobble McStumble Discovers That Mirrors Are 'Lagging By 0.5 Seconds'
summary: 'You're seeing your past self,' McStumble explained. 'That's why you look confused.'
fullBody: Professor Wobble McStumble has discovered that mirrors have a 0.5-second delay, meaning you're always seeing your slightly past self. 'That's why you look confused,' McStumble explained. 'You're reacting to a version of you that already reacted.' The study has caused widespread existential crises. 'Who am I now?' one person asked their reflection. It didn't answer—it was still lagging.
